items.title: Declare Convex as canonical backend
acceptanceCriteria: AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md describe Convex as the active backend
A deprecation notice is added for SpacetimeDB artifacts
No runtime docs describe SpacetimeDB as current production path

items.title: Remove dead SpacetimeDB repo subtree
acceptanceCriteria: The unused spacetime-backend directory is removed or archived outside the product repo
No CI, docs, or package references point to SpacetimeDB
Migration note exists for historical recovery if needed

items.title: Fix useSyllabus regression and failing tests
acceptanceCriteria: All automated tests pass
useSyllabus uses explicit dedup and retry-safe fetch guarding
The failing tests in useSyllabus.test.js and memory-stability.test.js pass without weakening assertions

items.title: Split runtime lint from pipeline lint
acceptanceCriteria: App runtime lint can pass independently of archived content-generation scripts
Historical scripts are either excluded or moved under a separate lint target
CI enforces runtime lint on src, convex, public, and active scripts only

items.title: Standardize frontend deployment path
acceptanceCriteria: One production frontend host is approved and documented
Build base path, deploy scripts, and hosting config align with the chosen host
Preview and production environments are defined and reproducible

items.title: Enforce runtime feature flags
acceptanceCriteria: Feature flags gate routes, navigation, and page entry points
At least one kill switch exists for live class and one for uploads or payments
Flag metadata includes owner, purpose, and sunset date

items.title: Add frontend CI quality gate
acceptanceCriteria: CI runs build, runtime lint, unit tests, and required Playwright smoke/mobile jobs
Production deploys cannot proceed on failing checks
Artifacts are uploaded on failure for debugging

items.title: Implement observability baseline
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend exceptions are captured in production error monitoring
Release health and core funnel dashboards exist
Alert rules are defined for major error spikes and degraded critical flows

items.title: Consolidate read progress into Convex
acceptanceCriteria: Read progress is canonical in Convex for authenticated users
Local read state is migrated without loss
Cross-device read progress is verified in QA

items.title: Consolidate activity metrics into server-backed projections
acceptanceCriteria: Home and progress metrics no longer rely on local-only counters for authenticated users
Badge and activity projections are derived from server events
Legacy local counters are migrated or deprecated

items.title: Refactor noteStore into explicit offline and Convex adapters
acceptanceCriteria: Guest/offline and authenticated storage paths are implemented in separate modules
Callers use a thin orchestrator instead of branching through a monolithic service
Contract tests cover offline, authenticated, and fallback behavior

items.title: Consolidate live-class sync architecture
acceptanceCriteria: Convex-backed sync is canonical for admitted sessions
BroadcastChannel is retained only as same-browser resilience transport where needed
Teacher and student live-class flows pass regression tests across offline and reconnect scenarios

items.title: Move internal pages out of product runtime
acceptanceCriteria: AdvancedPage internal test utilities are removed from the main app or protected behind internal-only access
BackendArchitecturesPage is moved to docs or removed from app routing
Production navigation and routing only expose product-relevant destinations

items.title: Introduce frontend TypeScript migration rules
acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript is enabled for selected frontend paths
Services and hooks use typed DTOs and return contracts
Migration rules prevent broad unsafe any usage

items.title: Restructure repo into app, pipeline, and docs boundaries
acceptanceCriteria: Content-generation scripts and extracted artifacts no longer sit in the application root
README and contributor docs explain the new structure
Tooling targets map cleanly to runtime code versus pipeline code

items.title: Version external HTTP APIs
acceptanceCriteria: External endpoints are exposed through a versioned path structure
Deprecation headers and compatibility policy are documented
Contract tests exist for each versioned endpoint

items.title: Move PDFs to dedicated object storage and CDN
acceptanceCriteria: Past-paper and note PDF assets are served from dedicated object storage/CDN
App bundle and frontend host are not responsible for large binary distribution
Access control and cache headers are defined for protected and public assets

items.title: Re-platform note and exercise delivery away from bundled JS
acceptanceCriteria: Notes and exercises are fetched through manifests or content assets rather than statically bundled modules
Bundle budgets are met for home and note routes
Content authoring and publishing pipeline remains deterministic

items.title: Add accessibility and performance gates to QA
acceptanceCriteria: Critical flows run automated accessibility checks in E2E
Performance budgets are enforced in CI or release checks
QA checklist includes keyboard, mobile overflow, and offline resilience validation

items.title: Retire legacy localStorage migration helpers
acceptanceCriteria: Migration success threshold is defined and met
Legacy note asset migration code is removed
Rollback/archive guidance exists for any straggler users
